title: bicornella alborubra
intro: Bicornella alborubra, also known as the two-horned white-flowered plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bicornella alborubra include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of a cream or salve, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
